//: Debt-ratchet config: strict type-check of src + ALL tests. scripts/typecheck-debt-ratchet.mjs counts the errors and FAILS if the count rises above the frozen baseline, so legacy loosely-typed tests can stay (a separate hygiene cleanup) while NEW debt — a loosely-typed or dangling-ref test — is blocked. Lower the baseline as the debt is paid down. The Studio safety surface is held at ZERO separately by tsconfig.test.json.
